title: The Enigma of the Bermuda Triangle

scenes.text: A region infamous for its enigmatic disappearances of vessels and aircraft.
The Bermuda Triangle lies in the North Atlantic Ocean between Miami, Bermuda, and Puerto Rico.
Over a thousand ships and planes are said to have vanished here without explanation.
Scientific explanations include natural phenomena, but many remain skeptical.
scenes.label: NATURAL PHENOMENA?

description: 📍 Bermuda Triangle - N/A. A notorious area where ships and planes have disappeared, the Bermuda Triangle continues to baffle experts with its strange occurrences. Follow for daily mysteries!
